title: Lesson 204: 吹く, 服, 服...

items.gloss: to blow (of the wind); to blow (one's breath); to breathe out; to blow on (hot tea, candles, etc.); to puff; to play (a wind instrument); to blow (a whistle, trumpet, etc.); to whistle (a tune); to emit (smoke, fire, etc.); to spout; to spew; to puff out; to sprout; to put forth (buds); to appear (on the surface); to form; to be coated with (powder, rust, etc.); to burst out laughing; to burst into laughter; to brag; to talk big; to smelt; to mint
clothes (esp. Western clothes); counter for doses of medicine, gulps of tea, drags of a cigarette, etc.
mourning clothes; mourning; period of mourning
two persons; two people; pair; couple
second day of the month; two days
